software-developer.title: Software Developer
software-developer.description: Design, develop, test, and maintain software applications and systems. Software developers create solutions for various platforms including web, mobile, and desktop.
software-developer.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field

path.title: Learn Programming Fundamentals
path.description: Start with basic programming concepts using Python or JavaScript

path.title: Choose a Specialization
path.description: Focus on frontend, backend, mobile, or full-stack development

path.title: Build Portfolio Projects
path.description: Create 3-5 substantial projects to showcase your skills

path.title: Learn Version Control & Collaboration
path.description: Master Git, GitHub, and collaborative development workflows

path.title: Practice Algorithm & Data Structures
path.description: Prepare for technical interviews with LeetCode and HackerRank

resources.name: AWS Training
resources.description: Free and paid cloud computing courses

resources.name: GitHub Student Pack
resources.description: Free access to developer tools for students

data-analyst.title: Data Analyst
data-analyst.description: Collect, process, and analyze data to help organizations make informed decisions. Data analysts work with statistical tools, databases, and visualization software.
data-analyst.education: Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Mathematics, or related field

path.title: Learn Statistics & Mathematics
path.description: Master basic statistics, probability, and algebra

path.title: Master Excel & SQL
path.description: Learn advanced Excel functions and database querying with SQL

path.title: Learn Python/R for Data Analysis
path.description: Master data manipulation libraries like Pandas and visualization with Matplotlib/Seaborn

path.title: Data Visualization Tools
path.description: Learn Tableau, Power BI, or Looker for creating dashboards

path.title: Build Analysis Portfolio
path.description: Complete real-world data analysis projects using public datasets

path.title: Get Certified & Apply
path.description: Obtain certifications and start applying for analyst positions

resources.name: Tableau Public
resources.description: Free platform to create and share data visualizations
